iterations.title: Initial hand-drawn network
iterations.notes: Initial paper-field branch network and drone bed.

iterations.title: Line wiggle
iterations.notes: Added line wiggle and object jitter.

iterations.title: Uneven tremble
iterations.notes: Different color structures gained distinct movement personalities; strongest early motion anchor.

iterations.title: Wobbly outline strokes
iterations.notes: Accidental yellow/red square-stroke mask behavior emerged.

iterations.title: Mask push
iterations.notes: Extended hard square masks and contour echoes.

iterations.title: Hard mask collision
iterations.notes: Removed blurred edges; hard binary collisions and stencil cuts.

iterations.title: Cut-up zoom threshold
iterations.notes: Nonlinear editing, punch zooms, reverse fragments, and hard threshold states.

iterations.title: One-minute song build
iterations.notes: First full-minute arc; sparse opening accumulated into a song-like build.

iterations.title: Sound reactive
iterations.notes: Audio envelopes drove glow, pulse, and camera motion.

iterations.title: Dub-tuned audio reactive
iterations.notes: Replaced thin MIDI textures with filtered dub bass, rounded lead, and sine percussion.

iterations.title: Collage sync dub
iterations.notes: Crops and multi-frame layouts were cut to newly generated dub audio.

iterations.title: Hard collage study
iterations.notes: Fully opaque multi-panel layout study; useful experiment but not the final direction.

iterations.title: Final direction master
iterations.notes: Returned to a full-frame home state with collage used only as punctuation.

iterations.title: Signature overlay
iterations.notes: Added persistent authorship and system identification.

iterations.title: Tethered stamp + sonic narrator
iterations.notes: Single-frame camera language, stamp embedded before crop/zoom, exact 60-second sync, and a mid-point sonic narrator.
